title: Smoky Roasted Guava Vegetarian Stir-fry
description: This herbal and juicy Venezuelan dish features a midnight craving with English mustard for a unique twist on traditional vegetarian recipes.

ingredients.name: 1 cup fresh guava puree (or 2-3 fresh guavas, mashed)
ingredients.notes: Optional for added sweetness and color

ingredients.name: 2 tablespoons olive oil or coconut oil
ingredients.notes: To help with the guava sticking to the pan

ingredients.name: 1/4 cup chopped fresh cilantro (for garnish)
ingredients.notes: Optional for extra flavor and color

instructions: In a large mixing bowl, combine the guava puree with olive oil, salt, and pepper. Mix well until all the guava is coated evenly.
In another bowl, mix together the remaining ingredients: guava-olive oil mixture, onion, bell peppers, garlic, and lime juice (if using).
Spread the mixture over a greased baking sheet lined with parchment paper or aluminum foil. Sprinkle with English mustard powder lightly.
Place in preheated oven for about 30 minutes, or until veggies are tender and edges start to brown slightly.

While the veggies are roasting, stir-fry your eggplant cubes by heating a bit more olive oil or coconut oil in a wok over medium-high heat. Add the cubed eggplant and cook until golden and soft, stirring occasionally.
Once the vegetables have finished cooking, combine them with the eggplant chunks. Let everything come together for another 5 minutes to meld the flavors.
Garnish with fresh cilantro if desired before serving.
